mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, full_name, email, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, full_name, email, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{fullName}, #{email}, #{enabled}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()))
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, full_name = #{fullName}, email = #{email}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
